mapper.sql:
FROM stk_dep_inventory stk INNER JOIN fd_department d ON d.id = stk.department_id AND d.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id AND (d.del_flag = 0 OR d.del_flag IS NULL) LEFT JOIN fd_material m ON m.id = stk.material_id AND m.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id AND (m.del_flag = 0 OR m.del_flag IS NULL) LEFT JOIN m_msun_drug_batch_stock bs ON bs.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id AND bs.active_env = #{activeEnv} AND d.his_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(d.his_id) != '' AND m.his_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(m.his_id) != '' AND m.his_spec_packing_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(m.his_spec_packing_id) != '' AND TRIM(bs.dept_id) = TRIM(d.his_id) AND TRIM(bs.drug_id) = TRIM(m.his_id) AND TRIM(bs.drug_spec_packing_id) = TRIM(m.his_spec_packing_id) AND stk.batch_number IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(stk.batch_number) != '' AND ( TRIM(bs.batch_number) = TRIM(stk.batch_number) OR TRIM(bs.yc_batch_no) = TRIM(stk.batch_number) ) LEFT JOIN m_msun_merge_stock ms ON ms.tenant_id = stk.tenant_id AND ms.active_env = #{activeEnv} AND d.his_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(d.his_id) != '' AND m.his_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(m.his_id) != '' AND m.his_spec_packing_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(m.his_spec_packing_id) != '' AND TRIM(ms.dept_id) = TRIM(d.his_id) AND TRIM(ms.drug_id) = TRIM(m.his_id) AND TRIM(ms.drug_spec_packing_id) = TRIM(m.his_spec_packing_id) WHERE (stk.del_flag = 0 OR stk.del_flag IS NULL) AND stk.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) > 0
AND stk.department_id = #{departmentId}
AND ( d.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') OR d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') OR d.referred_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{departmentKeyword}, '%') )
AND ( m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') OR m.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') OR m.referred_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialKeyword}, '%') )
AND ( m.speci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specKeyword}, '%') OR stk.material_speci LIKE CONCAT('%', #{specKeyword}, '%') )
mapper.select:
SELECT stk.id AS dep_inventory_id, stk.department_id AS department_id, d.code AS department_code, d.name AS department_name, d.his_id AS department_his_id, stk.material_id AS material_id, m.code AS material_code, m.name AS material_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(stk.material_speci), ''), m.speci) AS material_spec, m.his_id AS material_his_id, m.his_spec_packing_id AS material_his_spec_packing_id, stk.batch_number AS batch_number, IFNULL(stk.qty, 0) AS spd_qty, COALESCE(bs.stock_amount, bs.quantity) AS his_batch_qty, ms.stock_amount AS his_merge_qty
ORDER BY d.code, m.code, stk.batch_number, stk.id
